api_key.description: SimFin API key. The legacy connector sends this as the api-key query parameter; current SimFin v3 endpoints also receive it in the Authorization header.

base_url.description: SimFin API base URL override for tests or proxies.

company_ids.description: Optional comma-separated SimFin company IDs for company-scoped v3 endpoints.

tickers.description: Optional comma-separated ticker symbols for company-scoped v3 endpoints.

statements.description: Optional comma-separated statement set for statement endpoints, for example PL,BS,CF,DERIVED. Defaults to all documented statement families when absent.

periods.description: Optional comma-separated fiscal periods such as Q1,Q2,Q3,Q4,FY.

start_date.description: Optional start date filter for endpoints that accept start/start-date.

end_date.description: Optional end date filter for endpoints that accept end/end-date.

include_ttm.description: Optional boolean string for endpoints that accept the ttm flag.

as_reported.description: Optional boolean string for endpoints that accept the asreported flag.

include_details.description: Optional boolean string for the compact statements details flag.

include_ratios.description: Optional boolean string for price endpoints that can include ratios and derived metrics.

filing_company_id.description: Optional SimFin ID for the filings-by-company endpoint.

filing_company_ticker.description: Optional ticker for the filings-by-company endpoint.
